institution.name: Spartan College of Aeronautics and Technology

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 33% at Spartan College of Aeronautics and Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (744 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Spartan College of Aeronautics and Technology rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.3k → $20.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Spartan College of Aeronautics and Technology rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.3k → $20.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Spartan College of Aeronautics and Technology vs the 2018–2022 baseline (60.5% vs 66.1%).
